text: American Council on Education: Students on the Move The American Council on Education issued an issue brief, Students on the Move: The Future of International Students in the United States, in October 2006. The purpose of this brief is to summarize current research on international students in the United States, and to examine the position of the U.S. in relation to other key countries — source and destination — in the growing global market for students studying abroad. Current research indicates that while the U.S. still leads the world in the number of students studying abroad, trends in the other key destinations and sending countries suggest that U.S. leadership in this area is by no means guaranteed.
